description.para: Offsets of registers from the start of the device

briefdescription.para: Timer Load Register.
Timer Counter Register.
Timer Control Register.
Timer Interrupt Status Register.

description.para: This register bits control the prescaler, Intr enable, auto-reload and timer enable.

briefdescription.para: Prescaler.
Intr enable.
Auto-reload.
Timer enable.

description.para: This register indicates the Timer counter register has reached zero.

briefdescription.para: Event flag.
This table contains configuration information for each timer device in the system.
This table contains configuration information for each timer device in the system.
Initialize a specific timer instance/driver.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called before other functions of the driver are called.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.
points to the XScuTimer configuration structure.
is the base address for the device. It could be a virtual address if address translation is supported in the system, otherwise it is the physical address.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device has already been started.

briefdescription.para: Start the timer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

briefdescription.para: Stop the timer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the prescaler bits in the timer control register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.
is a 8 bit value that sets the prescaler to use.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the current prescaler value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

briefdescription.para: Lookup the device configuration based on the unique device ID/BaseAddress.

detaileddescription.para: The table contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration table entry corresponding to the given device ID/BaseAddress, or NULL if no match is found.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: Run a self-test on the timer.

detaileddescription.para: This test clears the timer enable bit in the control register, writes to the timer load register and verifies the value read back matches the value written and restores the control register and the timer load register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if self test was not successful.

briefdescription.para: Check if the timer has expired.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

listitem.para: TRUE if the timer has expired.
FALSE if the timer has not expired.

briefdescription.para: Re-start the timer.

detaileddescription.para: This macro will read the timer load register and writes the same value to load register to update the counter register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

briefdescription.para: Write to the timer load register.

detaileddescription.para: This will also update the timer counter register with the new value. This macro can be used to change the time-out value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.
is the count to be loaded in to the load register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XScuTimer_LoadTimer(XScuTimer *InstancePtr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: Returns the current timer counter register value.

detaileddescription.para: It can be called at any time.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

simplesect.para: Contents of the timer counter register.

briefdescription.para: Enable auto-reload mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

briefdescription.para: Disable auto-reload mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

briefdescription.para: Enable the Timer interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

briefdescription.para: Disable the Timer interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the interrupt status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

briefdescription.para: This function clears the interrupt status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuTimer instance.

briefdescription.para: Write to the timer load register.

detaileddescription.para: This will also update the timer counter register with the new value. This macro can be used to change the time-out value.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the scu timer.
is the count to be loaded in to the load register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XScuTimer_SetLoadReg(u32 BaseAddr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: Returns the current timer load register value.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the scu timer.

simplesect.para: Contents of the timer load register.

briefdescription.para: Write to the timer counter register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the scu timer.
is the count to be loaded in to the counter register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XScuTimer_SetCounterReg(u32 BaseAddr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: Returns the current timer counter register value.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the scu timer.

simplesect.para: Contents of the timer counter register.

briefdescription.para: Write to the timer load register.

detaileddescription.para: This will also update the timer counter register with the new value. This macro can be used to change the time-out value.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the scu timer.
is the count to be loaded in to the load register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XScuTimer_SetControlReg(u32 BaseAddr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: Returns the current timer load register value.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the scu timer.

simplesect.para: Contents of the timer load register.

briefdescription.para: Write to the timer counter register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the scu timer.
is the count to be loaded in to the counter register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XScuTimer_SetIntrReg(u32 BaseAddr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: Returns the current timer counter register value.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the scu timer.

simplesect.para: Contents of the timer counter register.

briefdescription.para: Read from the given Timer register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the register offset to be read

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XScuTimer_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddr, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: Write to the given Timer register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the register offset to be written
is the 32-bit value to write to the register

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XScuTimer_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddr, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: Contains the implementation of interface functions of the SCU Timer driver.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains method for static initialization (compile-time) of the driver.
Contains diagnostic self-test functions for the XScuTimer driver.
This file contains the hardware interface to the Timer.
This file contains a table that specifies the configuration of the SCU Timer in the system.
See xscutimer.h for a description of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a nm 03/10/10 First release 2.1 sk 02/26/15 Modified the code for MISRA-C:2012 compliance. 2.5 dp 07/11/23 Add Support for system device tree flow

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a nm 03/10/10 First release 2.1 sk 02/26/15 Modified the code for MISRA-C:2012 compliance.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a nm 03/10/10 First release 1.01a sdm 02/02/12 Added low level macros to read/write load, counter, control and interrupt registers 1.02a sg 07/17/12 Included xil_assert.h for CR 667947. This is an issue when the xstatus.h in the common driver overwrites the xstatus.h of the standalone BSP during the libgen. 2.1 sk 02/26/15 Modified the code for MISRA-C:2012 compliance.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a nm 03/10/10 First release 2.1 sk 02/26/15 Modified the code for MISRA-C:2012 compliance. 2.5 dp 07/11/23 Add Support for system device tree flow 2.8 bdk 12/08/25 Updated comments to support SDT flow for Doxygen documentation.
